title: jobops.content.queued v1
description: Emitted by job-ops (internal/bus/publish.go, EventContentQueued) when a piece of content (post, article, outreach copy, etc.) is queued for publication. Backfilled schema — channel had live Redis traffic with no registered schema.

channel.description: Distribution channel the content is queued for (e.g. 'linkedin', 'blog', 'email').
